name: Moonstone Renewer

passives.name: Starlit Grace
passives.effects: {{tip|Heal|Healing}} or {{tip|shield|shielding}} an allied champion chains the effect to the other nearest allied champion within {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 800 units of them (''excluding yourself''), granting them 30% of the heal or 35% of the shield's initial strength. If no other allied champions are in the radius, grant the same target an additional 30% of the heal or 35% of the shield.

effects_structured.raw: Healing or shielding an allied champion chains to the nearest other allied champion within 800 units (excluding yourself), granting 30% of the heal or 35% of the shield's initial strength.
If no other allied champions are in range, the same target receives an additional 30% of the heal or 35% of the shield.

simpleDescription: Your heals and shields cool down faster and have greater effect on low health allies

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Healing or shielding an allied champion attempts to chain to the nearest other ally within 800 units of the primary target (excluding self), at 30% heal or 35% shield strength.
Fallback model: If no other ally is available in range, Moonstone applies the extra 30%/35% value to the same primary target instead.
Code follow-up needed: runtime currently needs explicit multi-ally target-selection and fallback resolution support to simulate Starlit Grace chain behavior accurately.
